title: PageKit — Ship a beautiful site in minutes
description: A fast, customizable website template system. Edit everything through content — no code required.

sections.heading: Ship a beautiful site in minutes
sections.subheading: PageKit is a fast, customizable template system. Compose your page from ready-made sections and edit every word, color, and link through content — no code required.

sections.heading: Content-driven by design
sections.body: Every section on this page is defined in a JSON file. Swap the theme, reorder sections, or rewrite copy without opening a component. PageKit handles the rendering, accessibility, and responsive layout for you.

items.title: Theme engine
items.description: Light, dark, and custom palettes driven entirely by theme.json.

items.title: Composable sections
items.description: Reorder and configure sections from a single JSON page definition.

items.title: Accessible by default
items.description: Semantic markup, keyboard nav, and AA contrast out of the box.

items.title: Fast
items.description: Static-first rendering with Next.js App Router. Instant loads.

items.title: Responsive
items.description: Fluid layouts that look right from phone to widescreen.

items.title: Markdown blog
items.description: Write posts in Markdown with frontmatter. Categories included.

sections.heading: Simple, honest pricing
sections.subheading: Start free. Upgrade when you grow.

plans.name: Starter
plans.description: Everything to launch a personal site.

items.quote: I launched my portfolio in an afternoon and it looks better than sites I paid thousands for.
items.author: Jamie Chen

items.quote: The content-first approach means my non-technical client can update copy without breaking anything.
items.author: Sam Okafor

items.quote: Theme switching is genuinely a one-line change. This is how templates should work.
items.author: Priya Nair

items.question: Do I need to know how to code?
items.answer: No. Every piece of content lives in JSON and Markdown files, and a dashboard can edit them with forms generated from the schema.

items.question: Can I change the colors and fonts?
items.answer: Yes — the entire visual system is defined in theme.json. Edit the tokens and the whole site re-themes instantly, including dark mode.

items.question: Is it really free?
items.answer: The Starter tier is free forever and open source under the MIT license. Pro and Team add hosted conveniences.

items.question: What is it built with?
items.answer: Next.js App Router, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS — modern, fast, and well-documented.

sections.heading: Ready to build?
sections.subheading: Tell us what you're making and we'll help you get started.
